title: ‘Melodies of Healing’ to be held in Mossel Bay
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The Mossel Bay Police Station’s commander, Lieutenant Colonel Ashley Michaels, and her team will host Melodies of Healing this Sunday, 7 December, which is an event to encourage unity and support through song during 16 Days of Activism.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Police Station’s commander, Lieutenant Colonel Ashley Michaels, and her team will host Melodies of Healing this Sunday, 7 December, which is an event to encourage unity and support through song during 16 Days of Activism."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event will feature various local singers and will be held at the Lutheran Church in Ext 6, Mossel Bay, at 16:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pr Shireen Hendricks will be the MC and there will be performances by Gift Gwe, Alicia October, Marsha Lombaard, Keysha van Wyk, Sma Nqgangala and Meagan Fillies.","html":"Pr Shireen Hendricks will be the MC and there will be performances by Gift Gwe, Alicia October, Marsha Lombaard, Keysha van Wyk, Sma Nqgangala and Meagan Fillies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Michaels will also be speaking, as well as Deidre Swanepoel of the Mossel Bay CPF.","html":"Michaels will also be speaking, as well as Deidre Swanepoel of the Mossel Bay CPF."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Enquiries: the Mossel Bay Police Station on 044 606 2804.","html":"Enquiries: the Mossel Bay Police Station on 044 606 2804."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: ‘Melodies of Healing’ to be held in Mossel Bay
